elections.note: NUMERATOR NOT SOURCEABLE. San Mateo's live election-night results page for Nov 2012 was never captured by the Wayback Machine: the county's pre-2017 elections site (smcare.org/elections) has no archived results pages (CDX returns only homepage/image junk, last ~2013), the modern smcacre.org Drupal site's earliest capture is 2017-05, the livevoterturnout ENR vendor was not used until 2022 (and its older SanMateoCA/LiveResults system only back to 2019), and news (Daily Journal/Patch/Mercury) reports contest margins and turnout % rather than the cumulative county-wide ballots-counted plateau. Pre-VCA traditional election (polling places + VBM): certified breakdown = 119,212 Election Day precinct + 169,380 VBM = 288,592 ballots cast (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; eligible 479,562, registered 361,486, turnout 60.18%). Pre-epollbook (adopted 2018); ASV never. No archived plateau snapshot exists; certified final is solid.

NUMERATOR NOT SOURCEABLE (same archival gap as 2012). No Wayback capture of San Mateo's live election-night results for Nov 2014 exists (old smcare.org results pages uncrawled; smcacre.org begins 2017; ENR vendor starts 2022). Pre-VCA traditional election: certified breakdown = 54,056 Election Day precinct + 110,397 VBM = 164,453 ballots cast (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; eligible 490,797, registered 355,598, turnout 33.51%, VBM 67.1%). Pre-epollbook; ASV never. Certified final is solid; election-night plateau unavailable.

NUMERATOR NOT SOURCEABLE. The only Nov-2016 captures are post-canvass: the Patch 'real-time results' page was archived Nov 12 2016 and renders empty (embedded vendor iframe not preserved), and the county results page was first archived in 2019/2022 (shows certified, not election night). Pre-VCA traditional election (last presidential before VCA/e-pollbooks): certified breakdown = 105,014 polls + 218,289 VBM (incl. 7,628 early voting-center) = 323,303 ballots cast (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; registered 395,928, turnout 81.66% of registered, 64.17% of eligible; Patch/county confirm 323,303 total, 210,661 mailed VBM + 105,014 polls + 7,628 early). Pre-epollbook; ASV never. Election-night plateau unavailable; certified final solid.

PLATEAU = last election-night report. County results page captured 2018-11-07 12:11 UTC = Nov 7 4:11 AM PST (the morning AFTER election night, during the pause before the multi-day canvass resumed) shows 'Registration and Turnout': Total Registered Voters 399,591; Precinct Ballots Cast 0; Vote Center Ballots Cast 26,210 (6.6%); Vote by Mail Ballots Cast 85,427 (21.4%); Total Ballots Cast 111,637 (27.9%). Identical figures render from the Nov 12 embed capture (smcacre.org/dd/embed/electionresults -> nov2018_results.html), confirming the count held from election night. Vote-center ballots being present (26,210 ~ 77% of the certified 34,005 in-person) marks this as the END-of-night plateau, NOT the 8 PM first tranche (which for a VCA county is pre-processed VBM only, vote centers = 0). FIRST VCA vote-center / e-pollbook election for San Mateo (post): same-day-dropped mail dominates and is processed in the canvass, so the election-night share fell to ~38% (mirrors Napa 2018 = 38.11%). NOTE the confound: the drop reflects the VCA all-mail/vote-center transition, which coincided with e-pollbook adoption in 2018. Certified final 290,058 voters = 34,005 vote-center + 256,053 VBM (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; 88.28% VBM, 72.63% of registered). Pct = 111,637/290,058 = 38.49%. ASV never. Snapshot 20181107121103 used.

EXACT PLATEAU NOT SOURCEABLE; bounded proxy only. San Mateo used the livevoterturnout ENR (electionresults page index 11) for Nov 2022, but Wayback archived only the bare HTML shell (2022-11-09 17:42 UTC = Nov 9 9:42 AM PST, within the post-night pause before the scheduled Thu Nov 10 canvass release) and NOT its data feed (summary_11.xml / sanmateocaenr_11.txt are absent from CDX), so the page renders empty and gives no number; the smcacre.org results page is just an ENR iframe wrapper (also empty). The only published proxy is the SM Daily Journal (Nov 10/11, 2022): 'about 130,000 ballots left to count countywide' as of the Thursday Nov 10 returns -> ~122,233 counted by Nov 10 (= certified 252,233 - 130,000). That is the FIRST canvass-day release, an UPPER BOUND above the Tue-night/Wed plateau, so it is not recorded as the election-night value (no-substitution rule). Structurally the plateau is likely ~110-120K (~44-48%), in line with Napa 2022 (43.21%). Post-VCA / e-pollbook (adopted 2018). Certified final 252,233 voters = 17,961 vote-center + 234,272 VBM (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; 92.88% VBM, 58.29% of registered). Election-night numerator left null.

PLATEAU = last election-night report. Rendered livevoterturnout ENR (index 16) capture 2024-11-07 08:53 UTC carries embedded data timestamp 'Website Updated: 11/6/2024 2:18:48 AM' (the final election-night update, ~2:18 AM Nov 6 PST after all vote-center ballots were tallied): VOTER TURNOUT 'Ballots Counted 213,421' = Vote by Mail 178,796 + Vote Center 34,625 (Registered Voters 443,164). The next ENR capture (Nov 15) jumps to data 'Updated 11/13/2024' (canvass), confirming 213,421 held through the multi-day pause = the plateau. NOT the 8:10 PM first tranche (pre-processed VBM only). Vote-center 34,625 ~ 88% of the certified 39,466 in-person, consistent with end-of-night. Certified final 337,241 voters = 39,466 vote-center + 297,775 VBM (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County; 88.30% VBM, 76.07% of registered, 65.63% of eligible). Pct = 213,421/337,241 = 63.28% (above SF's ~57% calibration because San Mateo pre-processes a larger VBM share). Post-VCA / e-pollbook (adopted 2018). ASV never. (2020 deliberately excluded as a COVID universal-VBM outlier.) Snapshot 20241107085324 used.
